acceptance_criteria_review.duplicate_question_image_paths_fail: Pass. Cross-record duplicate question image paths now produce duplicate_question_image_path failures.
acceptance_criteria_review.duplicate_mark_scheme_image_paths_fail: Pass. Cross-record duplicate mark-scheme paths now produce duplicate_mark_scheme_image_path failures.
acceptance_criteria_review.same_record_aliases_deduplicated: Pass. The regression fixture uses repeated aliases inside each record, but the duplicate record count is 2 rather than inflated by aliases.

test_quality_review: The test uses distinct question IDs and question numbers, so it isolates image path sharing as the failure cause.
repo_hygiene_review: The change is bounded to the existing audit and test file. No canonical outputs or manifests were edited.
scope_creep_review: No storage-content duplicate logic was added; this remains a path-mapping audit as planned.
regression_risks: If a future export intentionally shares one image across multiple records, the audit will force a review/exception path.

commands_run.result: expected failure: exit 1 due to 31 suspicious dimensions; duplicate image path mapping counts were zero

evidence: The only live failure group remains suspicious_rendered_crop_dimensions.
recommended_next_planner_focus: Add a strict manifest/path-kind consistency check so artifact paths cannot point to a question image from a mark-scheme field or vice versa.
